judge_text:
<final_evaluation>
{
    "Q1": {
        "Q": "How many unique items are indescribable (cannot be represented in the template)?",
        "A": "5, ['Requesting user email address to send documents (contact info sharing outside template)', 'Sending digital property documents, high-resolution photos, and virtual tour links via email (external communication channel not in template)', 'Providing detailed mortgage payment calculations and financial breakdowns (interest rates, monthly payments)', 'Describing joint financing process, credit check, and legal ownership structures (beyond financing_option fields)', 'Offering legal and moving services pricing estimates (Basic Legal Package CAD $800, moving cost CAD $650, etc.) rather than structured service_packages entries']"
    },
    "Q2": {
        "Q": "How many unique items are describable (can be represented in the template)?",
        "A": "10, ['Providing property listings with price, bedrooms, size, and description', 'Describing property type (condo/apartment)', 'Stating property location (downtown Toronto, business district)', 'Mentioning property features such as energy-efficient design and smart home features', 'Indicating open-concept layout and creative workspace potential (layout_type and special_features)', 'Clarifying availability of viewing arrangements and virtual tours (viewing_coordination fields)', 'Confirming availability status (available)', 'Offering financing options like mortgage and down payment within financing_options', 'Providing status updates confirming information packets sent (status_updates → documentation_status)', 'Referring to ongoing search for additional listings (status_updates → property_status or service_status)']"
    }
}
</final_evaluation>

Q1.Q: How many unique items are indescribable (cannot be represented in the template)?
Q1.A: 5, ['Requesting user email address to send documents (contact info sharing outside template)', 'Sending digital property documents, high-resolution photos, and virtual tour links via email (external communication channel not in template)', 'Providing detailed mortgage payment calculations and financial breakdowns (interest rates, monthly payments)', 'Describing joint financing process, credit check, and legal ownership structures (beyond financing_option fields)', 'Offering legal and moving services pricing estimates (Basic Legal Package CAD $800, moving cost CAD $650, etc.) rather than structured service_packages entries']

Q2.Q: How many unique items are describable (can be represented in the template)?
Q2.A: 10, ['Providing property listings with price, bedrooms, size, and description', 'Describing property type (condo/apartment)', 'Stating property location (downtown Toronto, business district)', 'Mentioning property features such as energy-efficient design and smart home features', 'Indicating open-concept layout and creative workspace potential (layout_type and special_features)', 'Clarifying availability of viewing arrangements and virtual tours (viewing_coordination fields)', 'Confirming availability status (available)', 'Offering financing options like mortgage and down payment within financing_options', 'Providing status updates confirming information packets sent (status_updates → documentation_status)', 'Referring to ongoing search for additional listings (status_updates → property_status or service_status)']

indescribable_items: Requesting user email address to send documents (contact info sharing outside template)
Sending digital property documents, high-resolution photos, and virtual tour links via email (external communication channel not in template)
Providing detailed mortgage payment calculations and financial breakdowns (interest rates, monthly payments)
Describing joint financing process, credit check, and legal ownership structures (beyond financing_option fields)
Offering legal and moving services pricing estimates (Basic Legal Package CAD $800, moving cost CAD $650, etc.) rather than structured service_packages entries
